channel.title: mtr on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in mtr on IT notes

item.title: mtr
item.description: mtr to create a text file report $ sudo mtr --report --report-cycles 10 immortal.run > /tmp/immortal-mtr.txt Example of output: Start: Tue Apr 25 17:58:11 2017 HOST: M20160001.local Loss% Snt Last Avg Best Wrst StDev 1.|-- 10.19.15.254 0.0% 10 41.7 41.2 25.1 81.6 16.8 2.|-- 10.19.0.1 0.0% 10 0.5 0.5 0.4 0.6 0.0 3.|-- 23.189.27.97 0.0% 10 1.2 8.5 1.0 74.4 23.2 4.|-- 89.27.149.117 80.0% 10 1.3 18.4 1.3 35.4 24.
